title: Radio

vocabulary.meaning: a company or place that broadcasts radio programs
to send out a program by radio or television
a person who introduces and leads a program
to adjust a radio to receive a station clearly
happening at the same time as it is broadcast

questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'radio'?
How important is the radio in your life?
When is radio better than television?
What kind of radio programmes do you prefer to listen to?
Do you think radio is making a comeback with the Internet?
Where do you usually listen to the radio?
Do you think listening to the radio is a good way to improve your English?
Who is your favourite movie star?
Do you like listening to top-40 music radio shows?
Do you have a favourite radio show host?
Did video kill the radio star?
What's the difference between FM and AM radio?
Have you ever listened to a radio show from another country? What did you think?
Would you like to work in radio?
Would you buy an adaptor to add radio to your iPod?
Do you think most radio stations play the same old boring music?
When is the best time to listen to the radio?
Do you think we'll always have radio stations?
